Product thinking

Outcomes over output

I prioritize by business impact, user friction, and feasibility — not by who asks loudest. Every backlog item ties to a measurable KPI.

Continuous optimization

Products aren't launched — they're iterated. I use vendor analytics, conversion cohorts, and drop-off data to continuously refine post-launch.

Bridge builder

My biggest impact comes from aligning technical and business teams around shared goals — shaping what gets built and why, not just how.

Selected work

Rocket Mortgage · 2024–Present

Verification Services Platform

Replaced a fragmented, manual income verification process with a rules-based waterfall platform — dynamically routing across Truv, Truework, and asset-based methods by cost, coverage, and success likelihood.

$3.6M–$7.7M saved · 7–10 day cycle improvement

Executive Impact Summary · Rocket Mortgage

Verification Services Platform — Business Outcomes

"This initiative delivered two major outcomes: approximately $7.7M in projected annual savings through automation and operational efficiencies, and a 7–10 day reduction in loan processing time through real-time verification. The result was lower costs, faster loan decisions, and a better borrower experience."

$7.7M
Projected Annual Savings
50–70% reduction in manual verification effort across 100K+ loans/year
7–10 days
Cycle Time Reduction
Real-time data providers replaced multi-day manual verification
50–70%
Labor Hour Reduction
From ~50,000 hours to 20,000–25,000 hours annually
5 vendors
Dynamically Routed
AccountChek, Truv, Truework & TWN — auto-selected by cost, coverage & success rate
Impact #1 — $7.7M Projected Annual Savings
Annual loan volume ~100,000 loans
Avg. verification time (before) 30–40 min/loan
Total labor hours (before) ~50,000 hrs/year
Labor hours saved (50–70%) 25,000–30,000 hrs
Additional savings drivers
Reduced rework & errors Higher loan throughput Better vendor optimization Fewer exceptions & fallouts
Impact #2 — 7–10 Day Processing Time Reduction
Process Stage Before After
Document Collection 3–5 days 1–2 days
Verification Processing 2–3 days Same day
Rework & Follow-Up 2–4 days Minimal
Total Improvement 7–12 days ~2 days
Key enablers
Real-time API verification Pre-validated borrower data Fewer manual touchpoints Faster underwriting decisions

SaaS Default Management — Integration Ecosystem

Challenge

My Role

Solution
Automated data exchanges via Equifax, Finicity, First American Title & Mortgage Connect integrations
Impact · DXC Technology · 2016–2022

EarlyResolution SaaS Platform — Results & Business Value

"Led delivery of 8–10+ integrations and product enhancements for EarlyResolution — a cloud-native SaaS platform processing 2.6M+ monthly transactions — driving a 20%+ improvement in operational turnaround times through workflow automation and platform optimization."

20%+
Turnaround improvement
Reduced manual processing steps and accelerated operational workflows across the servicing platform
2.6M+
Monthly transactions
Supported a high-volume, cloud-native default management platform serving enterprise financial services clients
8–10+
Integrations delivered
Connected Equifax, Finicity, First American Title, Mortgage Connect — unifying data across the servicing ecosystem
20%+ — How it was achieved
Before
  • Manual vendor data exchanges via email and spreadsheets
  • No standardized integration or routing logic
  • Processing delays across siloed servicing teams
After
  • Automated API-driven data exchange with all vendors
  • Standardized requirements & acceptance criteria across releases
  • Streamlined workflows — 20%+ cycle time reduction
2.6M+ & 8–10+ — Scale & delivery
The platform processed over 2.6 million transactions monthly across default management operations. Reliability and data accuracy at this volume required each integration to be precisely scoped, tested, and released.
Integrations delivered
Equifax VOE Finicity First American Title Mortgage Connect +4–6 additional partners
Each integration required defined user stories, requirements, and acceptance criteria from discovery through release — all owned end-to-end.

AI & automation fluency

AI-enabled delivery

Use Copilot, ChatGPT, and Zoom AI to synthesize meetings, draft stakeholder artifacts, and accelerate sprint-ready requirements.

Decisioning & workflow design

Designed a rules-based, data-driven verification waterfall that dynamically routes requests based on cost, coverage, and success rates — improving efficiency and enabling scalable decisioning.

Data-driven prioritization

Used vendor analytics, conversion cohorts, and drop-off data to continuously reprioritize the backlog and optimize platform performance post-launch.

Automation workflow design

Identified and scoped opportunities to replace manual steps with automated decisioning across verification, loss mitigation, and payment workflows.
